scene.description: A region neither authority will read. Maya finds no meaning here to protect; Eden finds no structure to enforce. Both look away from it. Which is exactly why it's the most stable place you've stood in.

fragments.label: Just a Room
fragments.text: An ordinary room. A chair, a cup, a window with rain. Nothing means anything beyond itself. Nothing needs correcting. It is unbearably restful.

fragments.label: Where Maya Isn't
fragments.text: Maya cannot render into this space. For the first time since you started, you are genuinely alone — and you realize how rarely that has been true.

fragments.label: A Note Left Behind
fragments.symbol: Folded on the chair, in handwriting that is finally, plainly yours with no doubt: 'If you found this, you've started to wake up. Stay here as long as you can. They'll come looking.'

interpretations.label: Resolve to protect this blind spot
Report it — a gap this stable is a system flaw
